channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Will SpaceX Merge With Tesla? The Answer Might Be Hiding in Plain Sight.
item.description: SpaceX just filed an amendment to its IPO documentation, and one sentence suggests a major deal could be on the horizon.

item.title: Elon Musk: Coding Was a Top Job for Decades. It Will Be Dead By the End of the Year.
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has made yet another sweeping prediction about the future of work, this time aimed squarely at software engineers. Speaking at a recent conference, the Tesla chief argued that the entire practice of writing code in human-readable programming languages is about to...

item.title: At a $1.2 Trillion Market Cap, Is Tesla Stock Overvalued or Undervalued Right Now?
item.description: Tesla shares have historically been an unstoppable force, but it's now time for investors to assess the company's valuation.

item.title: With SpaceX IPO Imminent, This Strategy In Options Trading Bets On Rotation Out Of Tesla Stock
item.description: The largest IPO in history is days away, with SpaceX set to begin trading this Friday. While attention is fixed on the debut, investors may be overlooking a more actionable trade in Elon Musk's other public company, Tesla. Tesla's fundamentals have defied conventional logic since the company's in...

item.title: SpaceX IPO set to provide massive $11.6B windfall for teacher pension plan
item.description: The Ontario Teachers’ Pension Plan (OTPP) stands to reap one of the most extraordinary returns in pension fund history thanks to a bold 2019 investment in SpaceX. According to a recent report from The Globe and Mail , the Toronto-based fund invested roughly $300 million CAD (~$220 million USD at ...

item.title: Is the SpaceX IPO Crashing the Crypto Market?
item.description: The crypto market faces a hard question this morning. Can a single initial public offering, even one of historic scale, pull enough capital out of digital assets to bend their price action? Bitcoin (CRYPTO:BTC) is trading near $63,800, up 2.8% over the past 24 hours, yet the multi-week chart tell...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises Ahead of SpaceX’s Friday IPO
item.description: Investors are waiting to see if some investors will sell Tesla stock to buy SpaceX shares. The two companies have grown close, collaborating on AI applications and semiconductor manufacturing. Any merger will be after the SpaceX IPO.

item.title: I Used Starlink—and It’s Absolutely Incredible
item.description: What SpaceX’s Starlink is worth is for each investor to decide. How it works is easier to say. It’s remarkable.

item.title: Tesla China Retail Sales Jump 22%. The Stock Is Bouncing.
item.description: Tesla retail sales in China grew 22% year-over-year in May, ending a two-month decline. Tesla stock rose modestly early Monday after diving last week.

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Should You Buy SPCX Stock?
item.description: The massive SpaceX IPO is almost here, with Elon Musk's space exploration and satellite company expected to start trading this Friday.

item.title: Tesla skeptics will hate what this new reliability study says
item.description: In a notable shift for electric vehicle perceptions, Tesla has emerged as a standout performer in the latest iSeeCars longevity study, which analyzed over 174 million used vehicles. The data reveals that Tesla models have a 4.6 percent chance of reaching 250,000 miles, matching the industry avera...

item.title: SpaceX is being 'rushed' into the public market, strategist says
item.description: Humilis Investment Strategies chief investment officer and CEO Brian Belski chats with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman about why he won't be buying SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) when it goes public.

item.title: How Tesla’s Semi could reshape transform freight transport
item.description: Tesla is betting its Semi can transform freight transport with lower costs, longer range, and cleaner energy as diesel prices rise

item.title: Should You Buy SpaceX Stock This Week? Bull, Bear Arguments, and Red Herrings.
item.description: Depending on who investors read, the SpaceX IPO will either end Western civilization while ruining working-class retirement funds or usher in an AI-enabled global utopia, generating trillions in profits. For bullish investors, including Baron Capital and ARK Invest, the projected $1.8 trillion va...

item.title: Will SpaceX Merge With Tesla? Here's What Prediction Markets Say.
item.description: Trends on Kalshi and Polymarket are increasingly showing people betting that Elon Musk will push to combine his two largest companies.

item.title: A Tesla Is Twice As Likely To Reach 250,000 Miles As A Subaru | Carscoops
item.description: submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: VFACTS May 2026: Tesla Model Y tops the charts as EV sales surge in Australia's new-vehicle market
item.description: “The popularity of EVs pushed Tesla up to sixth place, tied with June 2023 for its highest placing ever in the top 10. Though it offers just two models in Australia, one of them – the Model Y mid-size electric SUV – was Australia's best-selling vehicle for the first month ever, and the only EV to...

item.title: Prediction: SpaceX Won't Merge With Tesla. It's Going to Buy This Nvidia-Backed Artificial Intelligence (AI) Company Instead.
item.description: Some investors think SpaceX could be interested in combining with Tesla following its $75 billion IPO.

item.title: Multiple Cybercabs spotted in an Atlanta service center
item.description: submitted by /u/Duck_Devs [link] [comments]

item.title: Is Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) among the Top 10 Stocks That Members of Congress Own?
item.description: With 123 hedge fund holders as of Q1 2026, Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is among the Top 10 Stocks That Members of Congress Own. Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Tesla Bitcoin Hit Versus China Growth Puts Focus On Core Value
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has seen a sharp decline in the value of its Bitcoin holdings following the recent cryptocurrency downturn. The company’s digital asset exposure is back in focus as investors reassess the risk profile of its crypto strategy. At the same time, Tesla reported around 40% sales ...

item.title: Elon Musk In Direct Talks With ASML For $119B TeraFab Chip Plant: CEO Calls Him 'Very Serious'
item.description: Elon Musk's proposed TeraFab chip manufacturing facility in Texas, intended to support AI infrastructure expansion, is already drawing attention from chip-equipment supplier ASML (NASDAQ:ASML), according to Reuters. ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet warned that Musk's semiconductor ambitions tied to Te...

item.title: BYD just answered the question Tesla keeps fighting in court
item.description: Every new piece of car technology eventually runs into the same awkward question. When it works, the carmaker takes the credit. When it fails, who takes the blame?

item.title: Starlink Is Incredible—and It’s the Key to the SpaceX IPO
item.description: What SpaceX’s Starlink is worth is for each investor to decide. How it works is easier to say. It’s remarkable.

item.title: Elon Musk Said He Wouldn’t Take SpaceX Public — Two Things That Changed His Mind
item.description: Elon Musk struggled massively with the pressure of Tesla being a public company. Many see the company as an obvious, insane success — especially as it trades at a P/E ratio of 357.29 — but the stress of getting Tesla to profitability and the difficulty dealing with quarterly financial analyst ....

item.title: Tesla owner fixes common feature complaint with crafty DIY retrofit
item.description: Tesla owners have long griped about the wireless phone charger in the Model Y and other vehicles. It often turns smartphones into miniature ovens rather than reliably topping them up. Software engineer and Model Y owner Michał Gapiński tackled this issue head-on with a clever DIY upgrade, swappin...

item.title: What Jensen Huang Just Said About Elon Musk Shows Why Tesla May Be Worth More Than SpaceX
item.description: Artificial intelligence has created some of the biggest winners in market history. Nvidia‘s (NASDAQ:NVDA) market value has surged into the trillions as companies race to build AI infrastructure, while investors have rewarded businesses tied to data centers, chips, and cloud computing. Yet the nex...

item.title: Tesla Roadster unveiling teased to be happening ‘in a few weeks’ by exec
item.description: The Tesla Roadster unveiling could be coming “in a few weeks,” according to the company’s Chief Designer Franz von Holzhausen, who said at the Tesla Takeover Europe Event in Austria that the all-electric hypercar could finally make its way to the production line after years of anticipation. Von H...

item.title: “Wait for the First Dip and Then Come In.” How Wall Street Experts Are Playing the SpaceX IPO.
item.description: While much of the market is gearing up to chase the SpaceX listing on day one, Constellation Research Chairman Ray Wang appeared on CNBC’s Squawk Box this morning, June 5, with a different message for retail investors: “I would actually wait for the IPO and wait for the first dip and then come in...

item.title: Patrick Bet-David Show’s Adam Sosnick Compares His Bitcoin 'Dry Powder' To The Tesla Cash That Built SpaceX
item.description: Bet-David said Bitcoin could go down to $30,000 or up to $130,000 on macro shifts, while Tom Ellsworth said Saylor's paper loss is meaningless until he sells.

item.title: Why Growth Investors Should Avoid the SpaceX IPO
item.description: The long-term growth potential of the stock compares poorly to Elon Musk's other company, Tesla, for one key reason.

item.title: Tesla Model Y Battery Tested After 16,000 Miles Of Mostly Fast Charging
item.description: This Model Y was predominantly fast-charged for six months but its battery remains very healthy.

item.title: Where do Waymo and Tesla currently stand in the AV race?
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is making progress in autonomous driving, but Waymo remains the clear leader in commercial robotaxi operations, according to a Barclays research note.

item.title: Meet the AI Company That Can Thrive Even if an AI Bubble Bursts
item.description: Tesla is integrating artificial intelligence (AI) into its solutions rather than relying on it to drive revenue growth. That could be good news over the long term if the AI bubble bursts.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi takes a big step toward Elon Musk's ultimate vision
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi has been on a long road, and after surpassing 1.7 million paid miles traveled earlier this year, Tesla sees a much smoother road ahead for its tentpole technology. Tesla bulls point to autonomous driving technology as the missing piece that will unlock the company's true valuation....

item.title: Tesla Sales in China Are Popping, But That Means Nothing If You Can’t Stomach TSLA Stock’s Absurd P/E Ratio
item.description: Tesla China sales jumped almost 40% in May as its FSD software rolled out globally. Here's why TSLA stock still belongs on your watch list now.

item.title: 96% FSD - what a time to be alive.
item.description: It’s hard to believe that that you can have a car that will drive itself at all, let alone 96% of the mile that you drive. Absolutely incredible. submitted by /u/chickadichina [link] [comments]

item.title: Should Investors Sell Tesla Stock to Buy SpaceX?
item.description: A SpaceX IPO could fundamentally change how investors perceive Tesla's stock.

item.title: Elon Musk Says Tesla, SpaceX's Terafab Will Be Grimes County's Largest Revenue Driver As SpaceX Defends Tax Deal
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk on Wednesday said the EV giant’s Terafab chip fabrication facility in Grimes County, Texas, would become the county’s largest source of revenue. Terafab To Account For 25% Tax Revenue In a response to...

item.title: Austin is crawling with cybercabs
item.description: Well, it appears I went for the catchy title 😂. So I saw maybe 5 or 6 different cybercabs going on a half hour walk downtown. Interesting thing is the next day walking more or less the same area I saw none, but I did see a bunch of Tesla Y based Robotaxis.

item.title: JPMorgan sets jaw-dropping Tesla stock price target
item.description: For the better part of a decade, JPMorgan was one of Tesla's most reliable institutional bears. Ryan Brinkman, who covered the stock for the bank since 2015, told investors to sell through earnings beats, record highs, and multiple cycles of Wall Street enthusiasm. His final target of $145, ...

item.title: Tesla’s EV Rebound Leaves Rivian and Lucid Facing a Tougher Investor Test
item.description: U.S. EV sales fell 27% in Q1 2026 after federal tax credits ended, creating diverging outlooks for Rivian, Lucid, and Tesla amid continued global EV growth.

item.title: All the new EVs you can buy with 0% financing in June 2026
item.description: Lease deals get all the hype, but a lot of people would still rather buy their vehicles. If that sounds like you, you’re in luck, because there’s a whole bunch of great EVs you can buy with 0% financing this month – including the best-selling Tesla Model Y! more…

item.title: Prediction: The SpaceX IPO Will Be the Greatest Fleecing of Retail Investors We've Ever Witnessed
item.description: Historical and structural deficiencies have laid the ultimate trap for everyday investors.

item.title: Elon Musk is poised to become the first trillionaire. Just how much money is $1 trillion?
item.description: Elon Musk is poised to become the world’s first trillionaire. It’s a staggering amount of wealth never seen before in the history of human commerce.

item.title: Elon Musk bullet-proofed his $1 trillion ‘Mars-shot’ pay at SpaceX after the epic battle over his $56 billion moonshot at Tesla
item.description: The CEO will have almost complete control of his Texas-based space company, without colonizing Mars or building a single non-Earth data center.

item.title: The SpaceX IPO Is the Biggest in History. That Doesn't Automatically Make It a Good Investment.
item.description: The SpaceX IPO is huge in terms of both buzz and size, but neither factor guarantees positive outcomes for investors.

item.title: Cybercabs spottings in Phoenix upticking!
item.description: No side mirrors. Charging port in the bumper. Unsure what their plan for charging is going to be.

item.title: People Who Worked On Tesla “Full Self Driving” Don’t Trust Tesla “Full Self Driving”
item.description: Some of them, at least. According to Reuters, the news organization interviewed a former self-driving engineer at Tesla and nine former data labelers, and they did not offer a singing endorsement of Tesla’s “Full Self Driving” (FSD) system. Reuters also talked with eleven independent traffic safe...

item.title: Nasdaq Posts Worst Drop Since April 2025, S&P 500 And Dow Drop As Strong Jobs Data Ignites Rate Hike Bets — TSLA, GME, META, BA, MSTR, GOOGL In Focus
item.description: Nasdaq, S&P 500 and Dow Jones indices all ended the week ending June 5, lower.
